title: Dashboard layout and 10-personality comparison grid (primary view)
acceptance_criteria: Header.tsx shows: system mode badge (green LIVE / blue SIM), underlying symbol, IST clock updating every second, WebSocket connection status indicator (green dot = connected, yellow = reconnecting, red = disconnected)

PersonalitiesGrid.tsx is the PRIMARY view — renders a table/grid with one row per personality: name, regime tag (colour-coded by regime type), open position (ATM strike or '—' if none), day P&L in ₹ (red if negative, green if positive), beats-Clockwork delta in ₹, win rate %; Clockwork row visually highlighted as benchmark row
PersonalitiesGrid data comes from TanStack Query (useQuery on getPersonalities()) with 30s refetch interval
DashboardPage.tsx grid layout: PersonalitiesGrid occupies full top section; below it are three panels: StraddleChart (left), SignalFeed (centre), EvolutionPanel (right)
DashboardLayout.tsx wraps Header + DashboardPage in a responsive Tailwind flex column; min-height 100vh
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
